title: Bludgeoning
description: Adds a unique shovel enchantment that will bludgeon all your enemies!
body:
Have you ever wanted to deal damage using your shovel?
Introducing:
**BLUDGEONING!**
It is an enchant ranging from Bludgeoning I to Bludgeoning V, and can only be applied to Shovels.
This mod is just that, an enchant that makes your shovel as strong as your sword and axe.
